name: zenify-my-terminal
description: Set up a fast, calm, focused terminal on macOS: WezTerm + zinit-managed zsh plugins + Starship or Oh My Posh prompt. Walks through the choices (terminal app, prompt, plugins, optional WezTerm goodies like project switcher and lazygit), applies the setup with macOS-specific gotchas already handled (skips brew shellenv, deprecated command-not-found tap, BSD vs GNU ls, PATH for spawned subprocesses, zinit turbo mode).
